name: Tee Box North Scottsdale
about: Tee Box North Scottsdale is an indoor virtual golf simulator and training facility powered by Trackman technology. It offers a comprehensive golf experience including professional coaching, precision club fittings, a fitness gym, and various simulator game modes. The venue is designed to provide a professional-grade training environment with detailed swing analysis and data tracking for golfers of all levels. Pricing is structured through memberships and available services, with a focus on community, skill development, and convenient indoor play regardless of weather conditions.
why_golfers_like_it: Professional-grade Trackman simulator technology for precise swing and ball flight data analysis
Comprehensive coaching programs that assess both swing mechanics and physical limitations
Flexible hours and all-season access to golf training and play
Integrated fitness and nutrition programs for holistic player development
Vibrant community atmosphere with leagues and group events

food_and_drink.notes: No on-site food service mentioned. BYOB policy not specified.
No on-site bar or alcohol service mentioned.

simulator_hardware.notes: Dual radar sensors with camera-based tracking for high accuracy

faq.question: Do I need my own clubs?
faq.answer: No, club rentals are available, though many members bring their own. Professional club fittings are offered to ensure your equipment is perfectly suited to your swing.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food and drinks?
faq.answer: BYOB policy is not explicitly stated. No on-site food or beverage service is mentioned.

faq.question: How long does it take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: Playing 18 holes typically takes about 2-3 hours depending on the pace of play and group size, similar to a traditional round of golf.

faq.question: Is Tee Box kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Yes, Tee Box is kid-friendly with programs designed for juniors and youth, offering a welcoming environment for young golfers to learn and develop their skills.
